heading: Chief of examining division
label: 7 Chief of examining division
text: The Comptroller of the Currency may designate a national bank examiner to act as chief of the examining division in his office.
notes: CodificationSection is based on Treasury Department Appropriation Act, 1924, act .Jan. 3, 1923
Similar ProvisionsSimilar provisions were contained in , , and in earlier appropriation acts.act Feb. 17, 1922, ch. 5542 Stat. 375

Exception as to Transfer of FunctionsFunctions vested by any provision of law in Comptroller of the Currency, referred to in this section, not included in transfer of functions to Secretary of the Treasury, see note set out under .section 1 of this title
amendments: Similar ProvisionsSimilar provisions were contained in , , and in earlier appropriation acts.act Feb. 17, 1922, ch. 5542 Stat. 375
